description: 72 - 12-02-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Mungo Woodifield (Minister Counsellor for Trade_and Global Issues, FCDO), and Ailsa Terry (Private Secretary for Foreign Affairs

participants.name: Mungo Woodifield
participants.role: Minister Counsellor for Trade_and Global Issues

text:
for Trade_and Global Issues, FCDO), and Ailsa Terry (Private Secretary for Foreign Affairs

No.10)

From: Ailsa Terry| Personal
Sent: Wed 12/02/2025 9:57:08 PM (UTC)
To: Mungo Woodifield[ Personal ]
Ce: Peter Mandelson| Personal ]
Subject: RE: ie

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Thanks — these look spot on. Pls do feed into NSS to ensure covered in future
briefs. We will certainly be raising tomorrow night.

From: Mungo Woodifield
Sent: 12 February 2025 13:59
To: Ailsa Terry
Ce: Peter Mandelson
Subject: aes

Hi Ailsa

RK

Hope we can find a solution that
works for both our countries and steel industries.

209

Best,
Mungo
Mungo Woodifield | Minister Counsellor, Trade & Global Issues | Cell: 
 
British Embassy Washington | 3100 Massachusetts Ave NW | Washington DC 20008 
| USA
EA: 
 |
JCS
Personal
Personal

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
